text: Before hiding in the safe house or Citadel, we shall:

options.text: Keep the main engine on standby
Stop and immobilize the main engine

explanation: When retreating to a Citadel or safe house during a pirate attack, immobilizing the main engine is a critical defensive measure. This prevents the attackers from taking control of the ship's propulsion and navigating it to a different location, thus complicating their objective and aiding in potential rescue operations.
